name: @borjie/swahili-linguistics
description: Swahili Linguistics SOTA (Wave 19H) — morphology + grammar + dialect intelligence layer for Mr. Mwikila. 18-class noun system with concord, full verb slot template (subject/tense/aspect/object/root/extensions/FV), dialect detection (Bongo/Coastal/Kenyan/Sheng), register classification, mining-domain bilingual glossary (TRA + Tumemadini), and morphology-aware tokeniser. See Docs/DESIGN/SWAHILI_LINGUISTICS_SOTA_SPEC.md.
